system.flavor: You strike with the power of thunder, a fierce flash that can splinter the masts of ships.
system.effect:
Effect 4 with phasing. Then attack one character you passed through, regardless of range. Damage from this ability ignores cover and line of sight.
Attack: 2 damage. On hit: +1d3
On hit deal 2 damage again if your target is 3 or more spaces away, or 2d3 again if they are 6 or more. Double this damage if they're in crisis.
